info.title: SpToolKit generator CLI
info.description: .NET global tool (command sp-generate) that generates C# stored procedure wrapper code from SQL Server metadata using JSON configuration.

options.name: --config
options.description: Path to sptoolkit.json config file [default: sptoolkit.json]

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for generated files (overrides config file)

options.name: --namespace
options.description: C# namespace for generated classes (overrides config file)

options.name: --schemas
options.description: Schemas to include, space-separated (overrides config file)

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Stored procedure names to exclude (overrides config file)

options.name: --wrapper
options.description: Wrapper class name (overrides config file, default: AppStoredProcedures)

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Print resolved configuration and exit without writing files
